description: Reserve & Crew Swap Manager — validates crew swaps and reserve activations against duty limits, qualifications, and medical status

hard_stops.label: Swap Creates Illegal Assignment
hard_stops.logic: Proposed swap would cause either party to violate flight duty time limits per AV-009 determination

hard_stops.label: Reserve Not Qualified
hard_stops.logic: Reserve pilot does not hold required type rating or currency for the proposed assignment

hard_stops.label: Reserve Medical Expired
hard_stops.logic: Reserve pilot's medical certificate has expired and cannot be activated for duty

soft_flags.label: Reserve Approaching Duty Limit
soft_flags.logic: Activated reserve pilot will approach duty time limits during the assignment period

soft_flags.label: Swap Affects Housing Coordination
soft_flags.logic: Crew swap requires housing reservation changes at one or more bases

soft_flags.label: Multiple Swaps Same Period
soft_flags.logic: Multiple crew swaps occurring in the same scheduling period — elevated fatigue and coordination risk

soft_flags.label: Reserve Pool Depleted
soft_flags.logic: No additional reserve pilots available at the affected base after this activation
